INFOGRAPHIC_PLACER:
- Placement 1: 0:05-0:11 | type=diagram | "3D Product Showcase: A rotating metallic cube with smooth camera orbit and dramatic lighting. Premium product reveal with reflections and glow effects."
- Placement 2: 0:11-0:18 | type=bar_chart | "Revenue Growth 2024: Q1 $2.1M, Q2 $2.8M, Q3 $3.4M, Q4 $4.2M. Bars grow sequentially with spring physics and staggered entrance. Highlight Q4 as best performer."
- Placement 3: 0:18-0:25 | type=statistic | "10,000+ Active Users - Kinetic typography with words scaling in dramatically, glowing counter animating from 0, celebration particle effects."
- Placement 4: 0:25-0:32 | type=diagram | "Particle Formation: 80 floating particles converge to form a badge shape. Ambient floating motion during scatter, smooth spring convergence, glow on completion."
- Placement 5: 0:32-0:42 | type=list | "Three Key Features with Transitions: 1) Design - Create stunning visuals, 2) Develop - Build robust applications, 3) Deploy - Ship with confidence. Each feature on separate scene with slide/fade transitions between them."
